text:
David W. Chapman Jr. wrote:
> Patching file Makefile using Plan A...

> Hunk #2 succeeded at 32.
> Hunk #3 succeeded at 42.
> 1 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to Makefile.rej
> Hmm...  Ignoring the trailing garbage.
> done

I didn't understand, I've extracted a fresh gsed port (from yesterday),
then applied the same patch I sent you w/o any problems !

in attachment, you'll find the same patch gziped and uuencoded.

Cyrille.
